title: Plexinium punctatum
intro: There is limited information about the plant "Plexinium punctatum".
taxonomy: Plexinium punctatum is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and the surrounding areas. The classification of Plexinium punctatum places it within the genus Plexinium and the order Gentianales. The plant is further classified as belonging to the subclass Asteridae and the class Magnoliopsida. Plexinium punctatum is also known to be a perennial species.
